indicators.name: Dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large and obstructs the view of the window.

indicators.name: Chair
indicators.rationale: The chair is ergonomic and provides good back support.

indicators.name: Floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor is warm and comfortable to sit on.

indicators.name: Cabinet-merged
indicators.rationale: The cabinets are too high and obstruct the view of the window.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (solo) due to the obstruction of the view by the dining table and cabinets, but it has a comfortable chair and a warm wooden floor.
